allocation_id.description: The unique identifier for the Elastic IP address associated with the NAT Gateway.

association_id.description: The ID representing the association between the Elastic IP address and the NAT Gateway.

connectivity_type.description: Specifies whether the NAT Gateway is public or private.

id.description: The unique identifier for the NAT Gateway.

network_interface_id.description: The ID of the network interface associated with the NAT Gateway.

private_ip.description: The private IP address of the NAT Gateway.

public_ip.description: The public IP address of the NAT Gateway.

secondary_allocation_ids.description: A list of allocation IDs for any secondary Elastic IP addresses associated with the NAT Gateway.

secondary_private_ip_address_count.description: The count of secondary private IP addresses assigned to the NAT Gateway.

secondary_private_ip_addresses.description: A list of secondary private IP addresses assigned to the NAT Gateway.

state.description: The current state of the NAT Gateway (e.g., pending, available, deleting, deleted).

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet in which the NAT Gateway is located.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the NAT Gateway.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC in which the NAT Gateway is located.
